userGuideSteps.description: Clean the surface thoroughly to remove dust, grease, loose paint and rust. For metal, remove loose rust and scale, and apply the recommended metal primer. For wood, sand to a smooth finish and apply suitable wood primer or undercoat as specified in the PIS.

userGuideSteps.title: Application of Undercoats
userGuideSteps.description: Apply the specified Asian Paints primer and undercoat system, ensuring proper drying and sanding between coats to achieve a smooth, uniform base for the enamel finish.

userGuideSteps.title: Applying Apcolite Premium Gloss Enamel
userGuideSteps.description: Stir the enamel thoroughly and apply evenly using a brush or spray as recommended. Maintain a uniform film thickness and avoid over-brushing to retain gloss. Apply the required number of coats, allowing the stated drying interval between coats.

userGuideSteps.title: Drying and Cleaning
userGuideSteps.description: Allow the final coat to dry fully before exposing the surface to regular use. Clean tools and equipment immediately after use with the recommended thinner.

faqs.question: Where can Apcolite Premium Gloss Enamel be used?
faqs.answer: Apcolite Premium Gloss Enamel is suitable for properly primed wood and metal surfaces, commonly used on doors, windows, grills, gates and other interior or exterior trim where a durable high gloss finish is desired.

faqs.answer: The product forms a hard, highly stain-resistant film with a rich high gloss, giving a mirror-like finish to painted surfaces when applied over the recommended system.

faqs.answer: Yes. For best adhesion and durability, use the appropriate Asian Paints primer and undercoat on wood, metal or masonry before applying Apcolite Premium Gloss Enamel, as detailed in the product information sheet.

products.name: SmartCare Damp Proof
products.description: SmartCare Damp Proof is a glass fibre-reinforced elastomeric liquid applied waterproofing membrane from Asian Paints. On curing, it forms a thick, seamless and durable coating that provides ultimate waterproofing for terraces and exterior vertical walls. The brilliant white, high-sheen finish helps reflect heat and reduce surface temperatures, while the elastomeric film bridges minor cracks and resists water ingress for long-term protection.

userGuideSteps.title: Surface Preparation
userGuideSteps.description: Clean the terrace or wall surface thoroughly to remove dust, loose particles, algae, fungus, oil and other contaminants. Repair major cracks and defects as directed in the product information sheet and ensure the surface is sound and dry.

userGuideSteps.title: Detailing of Cracks and Joints
userGuideSteps.description: Treat visible cracks, joints and critical areas such as pipe penetrations and parapet junctions with the recommended SmartCare crack treatment and reinforcing fabric wherever specified.

userGuideSteps.title: Application of SmartCare Damp Proof
userGuideSteps.description: Apply the first coat of SmartCare Damp Proof by brush or roller, working it well into the substrate. After the first coat dries as per the PIS, apply subsequent coats in perpendicular directions to build up the required dry film thickness.

userGuideSteps.title: Curing and Inspection
userGuideSteps.description: Allow the final coat to dry and cure fully before exposing the surface to ponding water or regular service. Inspect the coated area for uniform coverage and attend to any missed spots as needed.

Glass fibre reinforcement fabric as recommended
Brushes or rollers suitable for elastomeric coatings
userGuideTips: Follow the specified coverage, number of coats and film thickness from the PIS to meet warranty conditions.

faqs.question: What areas is SmartCare Damp Proof recommended for?
faqs.answer: SmartCare Damp Proof is recommended for waterproofing roofs, terraces, parapets, sunshades and exterior vertical walls where a seamless, durable waterproofing membrane is required.

faqs.question: Does SmartCare Damp Proof help reduce surface temperature?
faqs.answer: Yes. The high-sheen, brilliant white coating helps reflect heat and can reduce surface temperature by up to 10°C, contributing to a cooler surface compared to darker conventional finishes.

faqs.question: What warranty does SmartCare Damp Proof offer?
faqs.answer: When applied strictly as per Asian Paints’ recommendations and system specifications, SmartCare Damp Proof offers up to 10-year waterproofing warranty on terraces and vertical surfaces. Refer to the warranty document for detailed terms and conditions.

products.name: SmartCare Crack Seal
products.description: SmartCare Crack Seal from Asian Paints is a ready-to-use fiber-based compound with crack filling ability for both interior and exterior surfaces. The product page notes that it offers incomparable crack-bridging ability for plaster cracks of up to 3 mm.
products.shortDescription: Ready-to-use fibre-reinforced crack filling compound for interior and exterior surfaces, for cracks up to 3 mm.
products.surfaceType: Interior and exterior absorbent plastered surfaces
products.usage: Filling cracks and gaps caused by drying and shrinkage up to 3 mm before painting or waterproofing
features: Fibre-based crack filling compound supplied ready to use.
Strong filling capacity for cracks up to 3 mm width.
Water-resistant film that stops water ingress through cracks.
Superior mechanical strength due to reinforced glass fibres.
High flexibility and elongation allowing the film to accommodate movement.

specifications.Recommended Surfaces: Interior and exterior absorbent plastered surfaces where cracks up to 3 mm are present
specifications.Key Properties: Crack-filling, waterproofing contribution, mechanical strength and flexibility

productSpecifications.Usage: Crack repair prior to painting and waterproofing

products.availableSizesText: Available in 0.36 L, 0.9 L and 5 L packs as indicated on the SmartCare Crack Seal product page.

userGuideSteps.title: Surface Preparation
userGuideSteps.description: Open and clean cracks and surrounding surfaces, removing dust, chalky material and contaminants.

userGuideSteps.title: Application
userGuideSteps.description: Apply SmartCare Crack Seal directly into cracks using a spatula or putty knife, filling them completely.

userGuideSteps.title: Smoothing
userGuideSteps.description: Smooth the filled area to match the surrounding surface profile.

userGuideSteps.title: Drying and Overcoating
userGuideSteps.description: Allow the crack filler to dry thoroughly before priming and painting or applying waterproofing systems.

products.description: SmartCare Repair Polymer from Asian Paints is an SBR-based economical repair and preventive waterproofing coating. The product page describes it as recommended as a repairing and bonding agent for concrete/mortar in repairs such as spalled concrete floors, chajjas, beams and slabs, strongly bonding old and new concrete surfaces with plasters, and also usable for waterproofing toilets, bathrooms and small terraces.

userGuideSteps.description: Prepare concrete and masonry surfaces by removing unsound material, cleaning and lightly roughening as needed.

userGuideSteps.title: Bonding Agent Use
userGuideSteps.description: Dilute SmartCare Repair Polymer with water as recommended and apply as a bonding agent to old concrete before new mortar or concrete is placed.

userGuideSteps.title: Mortar Modification
userGuideSteps.description: Incorporate SmartCare Repair Polymer into mortar mixes in the proportions specified by the Product Information Sheet for improved adhesion and flexibility.

userGuideSteps.title: Waterproofing Mixes
userGuideSteps.description: Use specified polymer-modified mixes containing SmartCare Repair Polymer for waterproofing toilets, bathrooms and small terraces.
